title: Delivery Tags, Acknowledgements, and Redelivery · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a same-channel terminal delivery decision record with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a same-channel terminal delivery decision record and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Acknowledge, nack, or reject a delivery exactly once on its owning channel and prevent stale or cross-channel tag use; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Transfer ownership only after the intended durable effect, transactional inbox record, or safely repeatable handoff succeeds; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go messaging team handles case 1324 during quorum failover exercise during a rolling broker restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce same-generation exactly-one terminal delivery decision after durable effect; reject stale connection and channel generations; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Inspect the Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
